_metadata.translation_source: chapter 2 collation against 84820098-Role-Master-Creatures-Et-Tresors.pdf plus conservative manual equivalents for entries not clearly recoverable from the older FR edition
notes: Overlay is non-destructive: only FR-facing fields and helper labels are added.
name_fr is filled conservatively; proper names are preserved when no standard FR exonym was preferable.
description_fr remains null in this pass unless it already existed in the base file.
